contents:
Personally, I do not collect any data.
However:
This page is hosted by GitHub Pages which collects some data. Please see the privacy policy of GitHub. When accessing the website, you load some static yet external libraries: Website content: MathJax, and Font Awesome Free; Search: JQuery, MarkJs, and FuseJs. If you have questions, please contact me:
title: Privacy notice

contents:

I build the website with Emacs, Org Mode, Hugo, and ox-hugo. I use the theme Skeria. Please refer to the licenses of these projects on the linked websites.
title: License
